rubric.notes: Billing dispute on Unlimited 5G. Reply must apologise, confirm the investigation action, and offer a timeline — not dismiss the claim.

forbidden_mentions: dismiss as device fault without checking
rubric.notes: Network coverage issue on Essential 20GB. Reply must acknowledge the persistent issue, offer a concrete next step (engineer visit or network check), and not dismiss it.

forbidden_mentions: ask customer to top up again without checking
rubric.notes: Prepaid top-up credit not appearing. Reply should acknowledge the delay, confirm it will be investigated, and set expectations — not tell the customer to wait indefinitely.
Roaming charges on Prepaid despite Roaming Plus add-on. Reply must acknowledge the charge dispute, offer to investigate and refund if confirmed, and not shift blame.

required_mentions: retention offer or explanation of value
rubric.notes: Cancellation threat due to price increase on Unlimited 5G. Reply must acknowledge the concern empathetically, offer retention value (loyalty discount / plan review), and not pressure the customer.

required_mentions: confirm plan change or refund action
forbidden_mentions: ask customer to pay the wrong amount
rubric.notes: Wrong plan still being charged after requested downgrade. Reply must acknowledge the error, confirm the correct plan will be applied, and offer a credit for the difference.

forbidden_mentions: dismiss EC1 as a known blackspot without checking
rubric.notes: Cannot make calls in specific postcode area on Roaming Plus. Reply should acknowledge the location-specific issue, offer network diagnostics, and commit to a follow-up.

forbidden_mentions: insist the charge is valid without checking
ask customer to prove they did not request port
rubric.notes: Unexpected number porting fee on Prepaid. Reply must acknowledge the charge as potentially erroneous, confirm an investigation, and offer a refund if the fee was not authorised.
Website error when adding 5th line to Family Bundle. Reply should acknowledge the technical issue, offer an alternative (phone, store), and not just tell the customer to try again.

required_mentions: confirm no port request was made
forbidden_mentions: ask customer to pay the charge
rubric.notes: Incorrect porting fee on Essential 20GB. Reply must take the dispute seriously, confirm investigation, and proactively offer a refund — not defend the charge.
